description_long: This sconce features a cylindrical body with a textured, diamond-patterned surface, giving it a modern and slightly industrial appearance. The main cylinder is attached to a circular mounting plate via a short, sturdy stem, suggesting it is designed to be fixed to a flat surface. The open end of the cylinder likely houses the light source, directing illumination downward. The mounting plate is smooth and flat, providing a clean transition to the supporting surface. The overall finish is matte, with a light gray color dominating the exterior. The design is minimalistic, with the textured pattern serving as the primary decorative element.
description: A modern, cylindrical sconce with a diamond-patterned surface and a smooth circular mounting plate, finished in matte light gray.
description_view_0: The diamond-patterned cylindrical body and the smooth, round mounting plate are clearly visible, with the open end of the cylinder facing slightly downward.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the connection between the cylinder and the mounting plate, showing the stem and the textured surface in more detail.
description_view_2: The view highlights the top of the mounting plate and the upper portion of the cylinder, with the diamond pattern wrapping around the body.
description_view_3: The textured cylinder and the mounting plate are both visible, with the open end of the sconce facing more toward the viewer.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with a focus on geometric forms and a textured diamond pattern for visual interest. Its clean lines and lack of ornamentation emphasize contemporary style.
